per_handoff.agp: F-ENG.Testing>F-ADV:propose axiom:websocket reconnect needs jitter to avoid thundering herd,conf:0.85
per_handoff.english: F-ENG.Testing proposes to F-ADV. The axiom is 'websocket reconnect needs jitter to avoid thundering herd'. The conf is '0.85'.

per_handoff.agp: F-ADV>me:synth top3:c-140|c-142|c-141,reason:prompt cache win gives fastest measurable result
per_handoff.english: F-ADV synthesizes for me. The top3 is 'c-140, c-142, c-141'. The reason is 'prompt cache win gives fastest measurable result'.

per_handoff.agp: F-RED>F-ETH:challenge claim:flat rate limit is sufficient,counter:per-user bucket is enough only if bucket state survives restart
per_handoff.english: F-RED is challenging F-ETH. The claim is 'flat rate limit is sufficient'. The counter is 'per-user bucket is enough only if bucket state survives restart'.

per_handoff.agp: F-SCI>F-ENG:ask q:what is current p95 beat latency,window_min:60
per_handoff.english: F-SCI asks F-ENG. The q is 'what is current p95 beat latency'. The window min is '60'.
F-ENG emits to F-SCI. The p50 ms is '1800'. The p95 ms is '4200'. The samples is '47'.

per_handoff.agp: user>me:ask q:show me the last 3 synapse node states
per_handoff.english: user asks me. The q is 'show me the last 3 synapse node states'.
me emits to user. The nodes is 'node-32098e4b, node-a7c1b39e, node-d4f7890a'. The ready is '2'. The required is '2'.

per_handoff.agp: F-CEO>F-ADV:defer decision:open source timing,reason:requires cto confirmation
per_handoff.english: F-CEO defers to F-ADV. The decision is 'open source timing'. The reason is 'requires cto confirmation'.

per_handoff.agp: F-ETH.Privacy>F-ENG:challenge code_path:"cortex2/api.py:send_message",concern:logs full message body; should log id only
per_handoff.english: F-ETH.Privacy is challenging F-ENG. The code path is 'cortex2/api.py:send_message'. The concern is 'logs full message body; should log id only'.

per_handoff.agp: F-ADV>F-ENG:propose new_faculty:Economist,reason:several decisions touched cost-benefit without economics lens
per_handoff.english: F-ADV proposes to F-ENG. The new faculty is 'Economist'. The reason is 'several decisions touched cost-benefit without economics lens'.
